agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Relax lot coverage to 41.27% for new duplex at 3872 Spruce Street
agenda_briefs.summary: Council will consider an appeal to relax the maximum lot coverage rule for a proposed two-unit small-scale multi-unit housing development (a duplex) at 3872 Spruce Street. The developer is asking for permission to cover 41.27% of the lot with the building, instead of the 40% maximum normally allowed under Burnaby's Zoning Bylaw. This is a proposed variance — it has not been approved yet.
agenda_briefs.action_required: If you own property nearby or are affected by this development, contact Burnaby City Council before the vote to express your support or concerns.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
4.1
BOV # 6533 - 3872 Spruce Street
APPEAL: An appeal for the relaxation of Section 101.4 Development Regulations, 1 to 3 Units,  Maximum Lot Coverage, of the Burnaby Zoning Bylaw which if permitted would allow for a new two-unit Small-Scale Multi-Unit housing with attached garage at 3872 Spruce Street. The following variance is requested:
a) maximum lot coverage of 41.27% where a maximum lot coverage of 40% is allowed.
